name: yolo-chrome-mcp
description: Observe and control any open Chrome tab from Claude. Requires loading the paired Chrome extension once.
long_description: Pairs with a Chrome extension (loaded as an unpacked extension) so Claude can list tabs, screenshot, inspect the accessibility tree, read console/network/storage, and click/type/scroll/navigate inside your real, already-logged-in Chrome session. Destructive actions trigger an in-tab confirmation overlay.
